content.problemStatement:
Chef Go has planted a flower field ‚ÄĒ a grid with nnn rows and mmm columns. In each cell of this grid, a single flower is planted; let's denote the type of the flower planted in cell (i,j)(i, j)(i,j) by ai,ja_{i,j}ai,j‚Äč.

Today, Chef Go is going to make a new menu with two dishes: Tom Yum Goong and Tom Kha Kai. He needs to pick as many flowers as possible to decorate the dishes and make them look attractive. Each dish can only be decorated with flowers of a single type, so he can only pick flowers of one type or two different types. Also, Chef Go wants the flowers he picks to form one connected area, so that he can finish his job quickly. A connected area is a set of cells such that we can move from any cell to any other cell in this set by only moving between side-adjacent cells from the set.

Help Chef Go find the size of the largest connected area in his flower field which contains at most two types of flowers.
constraints: 1‚Č§ai,j‚Č§4‚čÖ1061 \le a_{i, j} \le 4\cdot 10^61‚Č§ai,j‚Äč‚Č§4‚čÖ106 for each valid iii and jjj
the size of the input will be less than 13 MB
1‚Č§ai,j‚Č§1001 \le a_{i, j} \le 1001‚Č§ai,j‚Äč‚Č§100 for each valid iii and jjj
1‚Č§ai,j‚Č§1061 \le a_{i, j} \le 10^61‚Č§ai,j‚Äč‚Č§106 for each valid iii and jjj
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains two space-separated integers nnn and mmm denoting the size of the field.
nnn lines follow. For each iii (1‚Č§i‚Č§n1 \le i \le n1‚Č§i‚Č§n), the iii-th of these lines contains mmm space-separated integers ai,1,ai,2,‚Ä¶,ai,ma_{i, 1}, a_{i, 2}, \dots, a_{i, m}ai,1‚Äč,ai,2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,ai,m‚Äč.
content.outputFormat: Print a single line containing one integer ‚ÄĒ the maximum number of flowers that can be picked.
